title: java-21-openjdk bug fix update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:

- Add Oracle vendor bug URL [Orabug: 34340155]

[1:21.0.9.0.10-2]
- Bump rpmrelease for CentOS build
- Add scripts to handle tagging of portable-based RPMs
- Related: RHEL-118771
